query:
SELECT 'vendas' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM vendas WHERE dataVenda < '2025-12-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'medicoes', COUNT(*) FROM medicoes WHERE dataMedicao < '2025-12-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lotes', COUNT(*) FROM lotes WHERE dataEntrada < '2025-12-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'consumoLotes_vendas_antigas', COUNT(*) FROM consumo_lotes WHERE vendaId IN (SELECT id FROM vendas WHERE dataVenda < '2025-12-01');
